title: gnome-settings-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[40.0.1-22]
- Use mount path in 'Low disk' notification when multiple mount points have same name
  Related: RHEL-11910

[40.0.1-21]
- Add build option to disable subman plugin
  Related: RHEL-4092

[40.0.1-20]
- Make 'Register System' notification launch registration dialog directly
  Related: RHEL-4101
full_text:
[40.0.1-22]
- Use mount path in 'Low disk' notification when multiple mount points have same name
  Related: RHEL-11910

[40.0.1-21]
- Add build option to disable subman plugin
  Related: RHEL-4092

[40.0.1-20]
- Make 'Register System' notification launch registration dialog directly
  Related: RHEL-4101

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20631-0.html
